records.ety: [L., neut. from maximus the greatest. See Maxim.]

defs: The greatest quantity or value attainable in a given case; or, the greatest value attained by a quantity which first increases and then begins to decrease; the highest point or degree; -- opposed to minimum.
quotes: Good legislation is the art of conducting a nation to the maximum of happiness, and the minimum of misery.

defs: Greatest in quantity or highest in degree attainable or attained; as, a maximum consumption of fuel; maximum pressure; maximum heat.
